temples.name: Baba Baidyanath Dham
temples.description: A major Shiva pilgrimage centre at Deoghar and one of India's best-known Jyotirlinga shrines.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Basukinath Dham
temples.description: A revered Shiva shrine near Deoghar, commonly visited as part of the Baidyanath pilgrimage circuit.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Maluti Temples

temples.name: Maa Chhinnamastika Temple
temples.description: A revered Shakti shrine at Rajrappa, near the confluence of the Bhairavi and Damodar rivers.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.

temples.name: Jagannath Mandir, Ranchi
temples.description: A historic Jagannath temple at Dhurwa, Ranchi, known for its annual Rath Yatra.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
